Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendant Foley-Pmi, Inc.
Off Calendar May-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Foley-PMI, Inc.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

James Ghilotti, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Louis Maldonado, who was not present at this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Foley-PMI, Inc.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on October 28, 2014.
Summons, Complaint and Statement of Damages were personally served on the Authorized Agent for defendant Foley-PMI, Inc. on October 12, 2015.
Statement of Damages as to defendant Foley-PMI, Inc. was filed on December 16, 2015.
Default as to defendant Foley-PMI, Inc. was entered on December 16, 2015.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on March 26, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Louis Maldonado, and against the Defaulted Defendant Foley-PMI, Inc. as follows:
